featured.title: A single AI agent session hit 534,000 tokens in one turn (2.7x the usual 200K ceiling)
featured.meta: field data from a 1,320-turn orchestration session
featured.description: Publishing live metrics from the fleet itself — how far can a single agent push the token ceiling before coherence breaks.

additional.title: MFA rotation can't stop modern attacks
additional.description: Consent phishing hands attackers authorized tokens that survive credential resets. OAuth-chaining vulnerabilities become flawlessly executable by agents. Hardware keys (YubiKey) remain the practical defense.

additional.title: Simple Claude structure to save tokens
additional.description: Practical token-economics structure for Claude sessions. Discipline beats cleverness.
